程序包 io.github.squid233.squid233slogger.logger

类 Logger

  • java.lang.Object
    • io.github.squid233.squid233slogger.logger.Logger
  • public class Logger
extends java.lang.Object
    作者:
    squid233

      Send message to console.

      Send message with custom styles.

      • Logger

        @Contract(pure=true)
public Logger​(java.lang.String name)

    • 方法详细资料

      • send

        public void send​(java.lang.String msg,
                 java.lang.Object[] objects,
                 @Nullable
                 @Nullable java.lang.String... consoleStyles)

      • send

        public void send​(java.lang.String msg,
                 @Nullable
                 @Nullable java.lang.String... consoleStyles)
        Send an styled message to console.
        参数:
        msg - Message to be sent.
        consoleStyles - Custom console styles. Can be field of Color, Style, etc.
        从以下版本开始:
        1.0.0
        另请参阅:
        send(String)

      • send

        public void send​(java.lang.String formatMsg,
                 java.lang.Object... objects)
        Send an un-styled and formatted message to console. The call Logger#send(formatMsg, objects) is effectively equivalent to the call System.out.printf(formatMsg, objects)
        参数:
        formatMsg - Format message to be sent.
        objects - Objects to use for format.
        从以下版本开始:
        1.1.0
        另请参阅:
        sendLn(String, Object...)

      • sendLn

        public void sendLn​(java.lang.String formatMsg,
                   java.lang.Object... objects)
        Send an un-styled and formatted message to console. Line breaks will added to the end.
        参数:
        formatMsg - Format message to be sent.
        objects - Objects to use for format.
        从以下版本开始:
        1.1.0
        另请参阅:
        send(String, Object...)

      • send

        public void send​(java.lang.String msg)
        Send an un-styled message to console. The call Logger#send(msg) is effectively equivalent to the call System.out.println(msg)
        参数:
        msg - Message to be sent.
        从以下版本开始:
        1.0.0
        另请参阅:
        send(String, String...)

      • sendMoreInfoPrefix

        public void sendMoreInfoPrefix​(java.lang.String center)

      • sendFormatWithMoreInfo

        public void sendFormatWithMoreInfo​(java.lang.String msg,
                                   java.lang.String center,
                                   java.lang.Object... objects)

      • sendWithMoreInfo

        public void sendWithMoreInfo​(java.lang.String msg,
                             java.lang.String center,
                             @Nullable
                             @Nullable java.lang.String... consoleStyles)
        Send a message with more info. Include time, center text.
        参数:
        msg - Message to be sent.
        center - Center text. Position is before sender name, after sent time.
        consoleStyles - Custom console styles.
        从以下版本开始:
        1.0.0

      • send

        public void send​(java.lang.String msg,
                 LoggerLevel loggerLevel,
                 java.lang.Object... objects)

      • send

        public void send​(java.lang.String msg,
                 LoggerLevel loggerLevel,
                 @Nullable
                 @Nullable java.lang.String... consoleStyles)

      • message

        public void message​(java.lang.String msg,
                    java.lang.Object... objects)

      • message

        public void message​(java.lang.String msg,
                    @Nullable
                    @Nullable java.lang.String... consoleStyles)
        Send message with custom styles.
        参数:
        msg - Message to be sent.
        consoleStyles - Custom console styles. Can be field of Color, Style, etc.
        从以下版本开始:
        1.0.0
        另请参阅:
        message(String)

      • message

        public void message​(java.lang.String msg)
        Send message to console. The message format just like this below:
        [${hours}:${minutes}:${seconds}][${threadName}/Thread[${threadName},${threadPriority},${threadGroupName}]][${sender}]${msg}
        Among them, ${} is variable.
        For example:
        [16:35:34][main/MESSAGE](Squid233's Logger) TEST SUCCESS
        To use it:
        LogManager.getLogger(String).message(String);
        参数:
        msg - Message to be sent
        从以下版本开始:
        1.0.0
        另请参阅:
        message(String, String...)

      • getSenderName

        public java.lang.String getSenderName()
        返回:
        sender
